Refrigerate for several hours before serving, to blend flavors.

Whisk dressing ingredients together and mix into salad. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate till ready to eat.

Toss lightly with the mayonnaise.

name: Jessica's Pea & Kidney Bean Salad
directions: Drain kidney beans & sweet peas in colander and rinse well under cold water.
Put in a large mixing bowl and add the remaining ingredients.
Chill 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Kidney Bean, Tomato & Red Onion Salad

name: White Bean Salad With Lemon and Cumin
directions: Place beans in large bowl. Add enough cold water to cover by 2 inches. Let beans soak overnight.

Drain beans. Place in heavy large saucepan. Add bay leaves and enough cold water to cover by 2 inches; bring to boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer 30 minutes. Add salt and continue to simmer until beans are tender but still hold shape, about 15 minutes longer.

Drain beans and place in large bowl; discard bay leaves. Add onion and parsley. Whisk oil, lemon juice, cumin, and cayenne in medium bowl. Season dressing with salt and pepper. Pour over bean salad; toss gently to combine. Do ahead Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Arrange lettuce leaves on individual plates or on large platter. Spoon bean salad into lettuce and serve.

similar.name: Tomato, Basil, and White Bean Salad

name: Tomato, Basil, and White Bean Salad
directions: Combine beans, tomatoes, basil and salt in a bowl and season with pepper.

Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.  Add garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant but not browned (approx. 2 minutes).  Pour over bean mixture and gently toss.  Let stand 30 minutes or longer to allow flavors to meld.  Can be covered and kept at room temp for up to 4 hours.

name: Kidney Bean, Tomato & Red Onion Salad
directions: In a small bowl, combine onions and vinegar. Set aside to macerate while preparing rest of salad, or up to three hours.
Halve cherry tomatoes and place in a serving bowl. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt. Add kidney beans, onion mixture and olive oil. Toss gently to mix, adjust salt to taste, and serve.

similar.name: Bean, Red Onion, and Parsley Salad

name: Super Easy Exotic Three Bean Salad
directions: Drain beans, mix and toss well.
Combine onion, oil, sugar and vinigar. Mix well and pour over beans.  Let sit in fridge overnight.  Stir before serving. Serve with a slotted spoon.

name: White Bean Salad
directions: Heat beans.
Rinse and drain.
Place beans in a bowl.
In another bowl, combine the sugar, dry mustard, wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Add tomato and most of the herbs and onions to the hot beans.
Toss beans gently with dressing until well coated.
Cook to room temperature, then chill.
Sprinkle with remaining herbs and serve.

name: Three Bean Salad
directions: Drain canned vegetables in a colander.Combine all vegetable ingredients in a large bowl.  Mix dressing ingredients and shake well, then pour over vegetables.  It is best after it has had time to marinate for a few hours, preferably overnight.
